AWS Access Keys                 Region name (ap-south-1)
AWS Role ARN                    Branch name
S3 Bucket name                  Build version
Database passwords              Project directory name
API tokens                      Echo messages
SSH private keys                Step names
Docker passwords


Secret 1:
─────────
Name  → AWS_ROLE_ARN
Value → arn:aws:iam::YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID:role/YOUR_ROLE_NAME

Secret 2:
─────────
Name  → AWS_REGION
Value → ap-south-1

Secret 3:
─────────
Name  → AWS_S3_BUCKET
Value → your-bucket-name

Secret 4:
─────────
Name  → S3_PROJECT_PATH
Value → myproject/codex
